title: SAP bets $1.16B on 18-month-old German AI lab and says yes to NemoClaw
summary: SAP plans to buy German AI startup Prior Labs and invest heavily in it. It is also prohibiting customers' agents use to a select few like Nvidia's NemoClaw.
title_es: SAP invierte $1.16B en startup alemana Prior Labs y limita acceso a agentes
bajada: SAP anunció la adquisición de Prior Labs, una startup alemana de IA con solo 18 meses de antigüedad, e implementará restricciones en el uso de agentes IA de clientes. Este movimiento marca el interés de grandes empresas de software en consolidar capacidades de IA avanzadas.
bajada_en: SAP announced the acquisition of Prior Labs, an 18-month-old German AI startup, and will implement restrictions on customer AI agent usage. This move signals large software companies' interest in consolidating advanced AI capabilities.

title: May 4, 2026AnnouncementsBuilding a new enterprise AI services company with Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, and Goldman Sachs
summary: Announcements Building a new enterprise AI services company with Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, and Goldman Sachs May 4, 2026 Anthropic, Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, and Goldman Sachs announced the formation of a new AI services company. The organization will work with mid-sized companies across sectors to bring Claude into their most important operations. Applied AI engineers from Anthropic will work alongside the firm’s engineering team to identify where Claude can have the most impact, build custom solutions, and support customers over the long term. Alongside the founding partners, the new company is backed by a consortium of leading alternative asset managers including General Atlantic, Leonard Green, Apollo Global Management, GIC, and Sequoia Capital. Why we’re building this Putting Claude to work in an organization’s core operations takes hands-on engineering and deep familiarity with how each business runs. Systems integrators in the Claude Partner Network lead that work for the world’s largest enterprises today, and we are continuing to invest deeply in those partnerships as Claude reaches more customers. This new firm extends that delivery capacity further. Companies from community banks to mid-sized manufacturers and regional health systems stand to gain from AI, but lack the in-house resources to build and run frontier deployments. “Enterprise demand for Claude is significantly outpacing any single delivery model. Our partnerships with the world's leading systems integrators are central to how Claude reaches large enterprises,” said Krishna Rao, Chief Financial Officer of Anthropic. “This new firm brings additional operating capability to the ecosystem and capital from leading alternative asset managers. We are proud to build it alongside Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, Goldman Sachs, and our other partners.” What the work will look like A typical engagement starts with a small team working closely with the customer to understand where Claude can hav
title_es: Anthropic forma nueva empresa de servicios IA con Blackstone y Goldman Sachs
bajada: Anthropic, junto con Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman y Goldman Sachs, anunciaron la creación de una nueva empresa de servicios de IA enfocada en medianas empresas. La compañía tendrá ingenieros de IA de Anthropic que trabajarán directamente en operaciones críticas de los clientes, con respaldo de importantes gestores de activos alternativos.
bajada_en: Anthropic, alongside Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, and Goldman Sachs, announced the formation of a new AI services company focused on mid-sized enterprises. The company will have Anthropic AI engineers working directly on clients' critical operations, backed by leading alternative asset managers.

title: GPT-5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized
summary: GPT-5.5 Instant updates ChatGPT’s default model with smarter, more accurate answers, reduced hallucinations, and improved personalization controls.
title_es: OpenAI lanza GPT-5.5 Instant con mejor precisión y menos alucinaciones
bajada: OpenAI actualizó el modelo por defecto de ChatGPT con respuestas más precisas, menor cantidad de alucinaciones y controles mejorados de personalización. La actualización busca ofrecer una experiencia más confiable para usuarios que dependen del modelo en tareas críticas.
bajada_en: OpenAI updated ChatGPT's default model with more accurate responses, fewer hallucinations, and improved personalization controls. The update aims to provide a more reliable experience for users who depend on the model for critical tasks.

title: Unlocking large scale AI training networks with MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection)
summary: OpenAI introduces MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection), a new supercomputer networking protocol released via OCP to improve resilience and performance in large-scale AI training clusters.
title_es: OpenAI presenta MRC, protocolo de red para entrenar IA a escala masiva
bajada: OpenAI lanzó MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection), un nuevo protocolo de networking para supercomputadoras que mejora la resilencia y rendimiento en clústeres de entrenamiento de IA a gran escala. El protocolo fue liberado a través de OCP, promoviendo estándares abiertos en infraestructura de IA.
bajada_en: OpenAI released MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection), a new supercomputer networking protocol that improves resilience and performance in large-scale AI training clusters. The protocol was released through OCP, promoting open standards in AI infrastructure.

title: NVIDIA Spectrum-X — the Open, AI-Native Ethernet Fabric — Sets the Standard for Gigascale AI, Now With MRC
summary: The race to build the world’s most powerful AI factories demands networking that keeps pace with the ambitions of AI itself.  NVIDIA Spectrum-X Ethernet scale-out infrastructure stands at the forefront of that race as the most advanced AI networking technology available today, deployed by industry leaders who can’t afford to compromise on performance, resilience or […]
title_es: NVIDIA Spectrum-X integra MRC para infraestructura de IA a escala gigante
bajada: NVIDIA actualiza su Spectrum-X Ethernet con soporte para MRC, consolidándose como la tecnología de networking más avanzada para entrenar modelos de IA masivos. La integración mejora la performance y resilencia de los centros de datos de IA más exigentes.
bajada_en: NVIDIA updates Spectrum-X Ethernet with MRC support, solidifying itself as the most advanced AI networking technology for training massive models. The integration improves performance and resilience for the most demanding AI data centers.

title: NVIDIA and ServiceNow Partner on New Autonomous AI Agents for Enterprises
summary: Enterprise AI has learned to generate. It has learned to reason. Now companies are asking the next question: How should AI act? Early agent systems have shown what’s possible, moving beyond simple prompts to take on more complex tasks. The next step is bringing those capabilities into enterprise environments — where agents must operate with […]
title_es: NVIDIA y ServiceNow desarrollan agentes IA autónomos para empresas
bajada: NVIDIA y ServiceNow anunciaron una alianza para crear agentes IA autónomos especializados en entornos empresariales. El proyecto avanza en la capacidad de los agentes para ejecutar tareas complejas más allá de simples interacciones de prompt.
bajada_en: NVIDIA and ServiceNow announced a partnership to create autonomous AI agents for enterprise environments. The project advances agents' ability to execute complex tasks beyond simple prompt interactions.

title: May 5, 2026AnnouncementsAgents for financial services
summary: Announcements Agents for financial services May 5, 2026 We’re releasing ten ready-to-run agent templates for the most time-consuming work in financial services: building pitchbooks, screening KYC files, and closing the books at month-end. Each one ships as a plugin in Claude Cowork and Claude Code, and as a cookbook for Claude Managed Agents , so a team can put Claude on real financial work in days rather than months. Claude also now works across Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint, Word, and Outlook (coming soon) through the Claude add-ins for Microsoft 365. Once the add-ins are installed, context carries automatically between applications, so work that starts in a model can end in a deck without re-explaining anything in between. Finally, we’re continuing to expand our partner ecosystem with new connectors and an MCP app, so the agents draw on the data financial professionals already use. Connectors give Claude governed, real-time access to a provider’s data, and MCP apps go a step further by embedding the provider’s own tools directly inside Claude. These updates pair best with Claude Opus 4.7, which is state-of-the-art on financial tasks and leads the industry on Vals AI's Finance Agent benchmark , at 64.37%. New agent templates for finance work Each agent template is a reference architecture that packages three things: skills (instructions and domain knowledge for the task), connectors (governed access to the data the task runs on), and subagents (additional Claude models that are called upon by the main agent, for specific sub-tasks such as comparables selection or methodology checks). Firms can adapt any of them to their own modeling conventions, risk policies, and approval flows. Enable these new agent templates either as plugins within Claude Cowork or Claude Code, or as cookbooks for Claude Managed Agents. Find all the plugins and cookbooks at the financial services marketplace . The full list of new agents is as follows: Research and client coverage Pitch builder
title_es: Anthropic lanza templates de agentes para servicios financieros
bajada: Anthropic liberó diez templates de agentes listos para usar enfocados en tareas financieras como construcción de pitchbooks, screening KYC y cierre de libros mensuales. Los templates están disponibles en Claude Cowork, Claude Code y Managed Agents, reduciendo el tiempo de implementación de meses a días.
bajada_en: Anthropic released ten ready-to-use agent templates focused on financial tasks including pitchbook building, KYC screening, and month-end closing. The templates are available in Claude Cowork, Claude Code, and Managed Agents, reducing implementation time from months to days.

title: Apple agrees to pay iPhone owners $250 million for not delivering AI Siri
summary: Apple has agreed to pay $250 million to settle a class action lawsuit that accused it of misleading customers about the availability of its Apple Intelligence features. The proposed settlement would apply to people in the US who purchased all models of the iPhone 16 and the iPhone 15 Pro between June 10th, 2024 and […]
title_es: Apple pagará $250M por no entregar Apple Intelligence en iPhone
bajada: Apple acordó pagar $250 millones para resolver una demanda colectiva que la acusaba de engañar a clientes sobre la disponibilidad de Apple Intelligence. El acuerdo aplica a propietarios de iPhone 15 Pro y iPhone 16 en EE.UU., con compensaciones de hasta $95 por dispositivo.
bajada_en: Apple agreed to pay $250 million to settle a class action lawsuit accusing it of misleading customers about Apple Intelligence availability. The settlement applies to iPhone 15 Pro and iPhone 16 owners in the US, with compensations up to $95 per device.

title: Apple Will Pay $250 Million to Settle Lawsuit Over Siri's AI Features
summary: If you bought an iPhone 15 or 16 in the US, you could be set to pocket up to $95 per device as part of the settlement.
title_es: Apple Will Pay $250 Million to Settle Lawsuit Over Siri's AI Features
bajada: If you bought an iPhone 15 or 16 in the US, you could be set to pocket up to $95 per device as part of the settlement.

title: Peter Sarlin’s QuTwo reaches $380M valuation in angel round
summary: QyTw0, the Finnish AI lab founded by former AMD Silo AI CEO Peter Sarlin, is now valued at €325 million (approximately $380 million) after raising a €25 million angel round ($29 million). It's a sign of enduring tailwinds for AI, quantum computing, and sovereign tech, especially for Europe-made companies.
title_es: QuTwo del exCEO de Silo AI alcanza valuación de $380M en ronda ángel
bajada: QuTwo, el lab de IA finlandés fundado por Peter Sarlin (exCEO de Silo AI), alcanzó una valuación de €325 millones tras recaudar €25 millones en ronda ángel. El financiamiento refleja el creciente interés en startups europeas de IA y computación cuántica soberana.
bajada_en: QuTwo, the Finnish AI lab founded by Peter Sarlin (former Silo AI CEO), reached a €325 million valuation after raising €25 million in an angel round. The funding reflects growing investor interest in European AI and sovereign quantum computing startups.

title: Google’s AI search summaries will now quote Reddit
summary: Google is updating its AI Search features to make it easier for users to find information from sources they know and trust. One of the more notable changes introduces "a preview of perspectives" from firsthand sources like social media, Reddit, and other web forums, effectively linking your search queries with online conversations around similar topics. […]
title_es: Google integra citas de Reddit en búsquedas AI
bajada: Google actualizó sus búsquedas AI para incluir perspectivas de fuentes de primera mano como Reddit y otros foros. La característica permite a usuarios encontrar conversaciones relevantes del mundo real vinculadas a sus consultas, mejorando la relevancia de resultados.
bajada_en: Google updated its AI search features to include perspectives from firsthand sources like Reddit and other forums. The feature helps users find relevant real-world conversations linked to their queries, improving search result relevance.

title: Chrome’s AI features may be hogging 4GB of your computer storage
summary: Google Chrome may be taking up more of your storage than expected thanks to a large on-device AI model file that, in some cases, is being automatically downloaded to the browser's system folders. Users who have noticed unexplained drops in their available desktop device storage are now discovering that Chrome is installing a 4GB weights.bin […]
title_es: Chrome descarga automáticamente modelo de IA de 4GB sin consentimiento
bajada: Usuarios reportaron que Google Chrome descarga automáticamente un archivo de 4GB con pesos del modelo Gemini Nano en carpetas del sistema, consumiendo espacio de almacenamiento sin notificación clara. El problema genera preocupaciones sobre consentimiento del usuario y transparencia en la distribución de modelos.
bajada_en: Users reported that Google Chrome automatically downloads a 4GB Gemini Nano model weights file to system folders without clear notification, consuming significant storage space. The issue raises concerns about user consent and transparency in model distribution.

title: Google Home’s Gemini AI can handle more complicated requests
summary: Google Home users can now ask Gemini to complete more complex, multi-step tasks and combine multiple tasks in a single command. Google has updated Gemini for Home to Gemini 3.1, which it says will improve the smart home assistant's ability to interpret and act on requests. The upgrade will also make Gemini for Home better […]
title_es: Google Home con Gemini 3.1 maneja tareas más complejas
bajada: Google actualizó Gemini para Google Home a versión 3.1, permitiendo ejecutar tareas multitarea más complejas con un solo comando. La mejora enhance la capacidad del asistente para interpretar y actuar sobre solicitudes sofisticadas del usuario.
bajada_en: Google updated Gemini for Google Home to version 3.1, enabling multi-step complex tasks to be executed with a single command. The improvement enhances the assistant's ability to interpret and act on sophisticated user requests.

title: FFmpeg developer calls out OxideAV for AI license laundering of his code
title_es: Developer de FFmpeg acusa a OxideAV de 'lavado de licencia' con IA
bajada: Un developer de FFmpeg denunció que OxideAV reutiliza código bajo una licencia AI sin respetar la licencia original del proyecto. El caso evidencia tensiones entre licencias tradicionales open-source y nuevos términos específicos para IA.
bajada_en: An FFmpeg developer accused OxideAV of reusing code under an AI license without respecting the project's original license. The case highlights tensions between traditional open-source licenses and new AI-specific licensing terms.

title: Adding Benchmaxxer Repellant to the Open ASR Leaderboard
title_es: Hugging Face añade protección anti-gaming al leaderboard de ASR
bajada: Hugging Face implementó mecanismos en su leaderboard Open ASR para prevenir benchmarking falso usando datos privados. La medida busca mantener la integridad de los rankings de modelos de reconocimiento de voz.
bajada_en: Hugging Face implemented mechanisms in its Open ASR leaderboard to prevent false benchmarking using private data. The measure aims to maintain the integrity of speech recognition model rankings.
